name: JFrog ML
description: End-to-end MLOps and LLMOps platform with model registry, feature store, prompt management, deployment and monitoring.

seo.title: JFrog ML — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: JFrog ML: End-to-end MLOps and LLMOps platform with model registry, feature store, prompt management, deployment and monitoring.

when_to_use: Versioning and distributing ML models through JFrog Artifactory
Integrating model management into existing DevOps pipelines
Securing and scanning ML model artifacts for vulnerabilities
Promoting models through environments (dev → staging → prod)

pros: Unified MLOps plus LLMOps in one platform
Leverages JFrog's enterprise trust and sales
cons: Heavy platform — overkill for small teams
review.verdict: Makes sense inside existing JFrog shops; outside that, best-of-breed rivals are sharper.
review.best_for: Enterprises already on JFrog wanting end-to-end ML and LLM governance
review.not_for: Startups that can mix Langfuse, MLflow and open tools cheaper
